_comment: Curated agent set shipped with grove. The marketplace uses this list to seed the picker on first launch — agents here are guaranteed to be supported (well-known wrappers, public release channels, no manual PATH dance required) and cover the three commercial ACP providers + one open-source option. New users get a one-click 'Install recommended' flow; experienced users can ignore it and pick from the full 37-agent registry. Adding a new entry is gated on the agent being stable in the upstream ACP registry for at least one release cycle.
